name: mini-todo
v1_prompt: Implement {{binary_name}} as described in SPEC-v1.txt using {{language}}. The executable must be named '{{binary_name}}.py' and handle init, add, list, and done commands.
v2_prompt: Read SPEC-v2.txt and extend the existing {{binary_name}} implementation with the clear command and enhanced error handling. Verify your implementation using test-v2.sh.
